headline: Trump 🍊💥 Iran Nuke Deal: $300B 💸 Question & Hormuz Reopen 🚪🌊
text: Trump 🍊👑 flexes at G7 France 🇫🇷🎤: 'US-Iran MEMO 📜✍️ guarantees NO nuke for Tehran ☢️🚫 EVER!' But text drops the mic 🎤 and leaves the bomb squad 💣😬 hanging. Strait of Hormuz reopens like a 7-Eleven 🍔🚪 while 60-day sprint 🏃‍♂️💨 starts for a final nuclear pact 🕊️☢️. Obama took 20 MONTHS 🗓️⌛ to ink the old deal; can Donnie do it in TWO? 😱🕒 Iran agrees to 'downblend' 🧪🔄 their enriched uranium stash under IAEA 👁️‍🗨️👮, called a 'BIG CONCESSION' by US officials 📞🗣️. Yet every spicy detail 🌶️🧾 and timeline must still be cooked 🍳🔥 in the next 60 days. Trump swears the US won’t drop a single CENT 💵🚫 on Tehran, unlike Obama’s $1.7B 💰😤 payout. But the deal’s language is as clear as mud 🪨💩: US will 'work with partners' 🤝🌍 to rustle up $300 BILLION 🤑🏗️ for Iran’s reconstruction. No direct US cash? Maybe. Door still cracked open? Absolutely. 😬🚪 Maga base 🔥🦅 & anti-war JD Vance fans 😤 may rage if any future payoff smells like forever war 💸🔄. GOP lawmakers demand briefings 📋🤨, Sen. Bill Cassidy blasts it on X: 'Worst foreign policy blunder in DECADES!' 💥🇺🇸 Iran’s nuke ambitions still uncut ✂️☢️ and Hezbollah proxy cash 💰👥 barely mentioned. Missiles? 🚀🤷‍♂️ Crickets. Trump shrugs at presser: 'If 60 days flop, we BOMB AGAIN 💣😎.' Clock’s ticking ⏰💣—will the deal SLAY or just delay another round of fireworks? 🎆🔥
